6.response: {"Q0":"No, I focused on ones I could trade in and green ones."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I assume something about decision making under time pressure"}

0.response: {"Q0":"I just remembered the sequence of keys to dig on each planet and generally chose the galaxy that had the best odds for a win, unless they were almost the same or both very low, in which case I generally opted for the higher value galaxy."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I considered them the same as when I got a gem or rock normally, so it didn't change my motivation"}

8.response: {"Q0":"The galaxy with the highest odds of success, unless the odds were close or they were both low, in which case I opted for the higher value one."}
